mechanism: Fiscal deficits at 6-7% of GDP simultaneously sustain corporate earnings (suppressing VIX via 8-10% EPS growth) and require $2T+ annual Treasury issuance (elevating MOVE). FX vol is suppressed as carry-trade positioning exploits rate differentials. The Kalecki channel is the structural explanation for why the divergence exists.
regime_dependence: Holds when fiscal deficit is large enough to meaningfully support corporate profits; weakens if deficit composition shifts toward interest payments to low-MPC bondholders vs spending/transfers
